name: Twin Cheese Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, add cheddar cheese and Roquefort.
2. Add pressed garlic, 1/2 cup of Coca-Cola, and remaining ingredients.
3. Beat with an electric mixer on low speed until blended.
4. Gradually add the remaining Coca-Cola.
5. Beat on high speed until the mixture is fairly smooth, light, and fluffy.
6. Pack into a covered container.
7. Chill. Refrigerate overnight.
8. Keeps very well for a week or more. Makes about 3 cups.
